mapper.select:
select role_id, role_code, role_name, data_scope, status, remark from sys_role where deleted = 0
and role_code like concat('%', #{query.roleCode}, '%')
and role_name like concat('%', #{query.roleName}, '%')
and status = #{query.status}
order by role_id desc
select r.* from sys_role r inner join sys_user_role ur on ur.role_id = r.role_id and ur.deleted = 0 where ur.user_id = #{userId} and r.deleted = 0 and r.status = 'ENABLED'
